physics-projectile-cliff: Create a projectile motion diagram: cliff at x=0 height 3, projectile launched from top with velocity v0 at angle theta, parabolic path to ground, horizontal range R, max height H, velocity components v0x and v0y at launch, and gravity arrow g downward.
physics-inclined-plane-components: Create an inclined plane diagram: plane from (-4,-1.5) to (4,1.5), block on plane, angle theta at base, weight mg downward, normal N perpendicular to plane, friction f down the plane, applied force F up the plane, and separate component arrows mg sin theta and mg cos theta.
physics-two-block-pulley-table: Create a two-block pulley diagram: block m1 on horizontal table connected over pulley to hanging block m2, string over pulley, tension T on both sides, normal N, friction f, weights m1g and m2g, and acceleration a.
physics-atwood-machine: Create an Atwood machine diagram: pulley at top center, masses m1 and m2 hanging on left and right, string over pulley, tensions T upward on both masses, weights m1g and m2g downward, and acceleration arrows in opposite directions.
physics-uniform-circular-motion: Create a uniform circular motion diagram: circle centered at O, particle at right edge, radius r, velocity v tangent upward, centripetal acceleration ac toward center, angular velocity omega curved arrow, and labels.
physics-bank-curve: Create a banked road curve cross-section: tilted road at angle theta, car as block on surface, normal N tilted, weight mg downward, centripetal direction toward curve center, and angle theta label.
physics-spring-mass-horizontal: Create a horizontal spring-mass diagram: wall at left, spring attached to block m on frictionless floor, equilibrium position x=0 dashed line, displaced position x, restoring force F=-kx arrow toward wall, and coordinate axis.
physics-simple-pendulum: Create a simple pendulum diagram: pivot at top, string length L at angle theta from vertical, bob mass m, weight mg downward, tension T along string, arc path, and tangential component mg sin theta.
physics-double-slit: Create a Young double-slit diagram: coherent source, barrier with two slits S1 and S2, screen at right, central maximum O, bright fringes, path difference labels r1 and r2 to point P, and slit separation d.
physics-convex-lens-real-image: Create a convex lens ray diagram: principal axis, convex lens at center, object arrow left of 2F, focal points F and 2F both sides, two principal rays, inverted real image on right, and labels.
physics-concave-mirror: Create a concave mirror ray diagram: principal axis, concave mirror at right, center C and focus F on axis, object arrow beyond C, two rays from object tip, inverted image between C and F, and labels.
physics-electric-dipole: Create an electric dipole diagram: charges -q at (-1,0) and +q at (1,0), dipole moment p arrow from -q to +q, field point P above center, distance r, angle theta, and electric field direction at P.
physics-parallel-plate-capacitor: Create a parallel plate capacitor diagram: two vertical plates separated by distance d, left plate +Q, right plate -Q, uniform electric field arrows from positive to negative, voltage V label, and plate area A label.
physics-current-wire-field: Create a magnetic field around a straight current-carrying wire: vertical wire with current I upward, concentric circular field lines around wire, right-hand rule thumb label, and B direction arrows.
physics-solenoid-field: Create a solenoid diagram: coil drawn as repeated loops, current I direction arrows, magnetic field B inside along axis, north and south ends labeled, and field lines outside.
physics-rc-circuit: Create an RC circuit diagram: battery V, switch S, resistor R, capacitor C in series loop, current arrow I, capacitor plates labeled + and -, and charging direction.
physics-kirchhoff-loop: Create a two-loop circuit diagram: battery on left, resistors R1 and R2 in separate branches, shared resistor R3 in middle, loop currents I1 and I2 arrows, and junction labels A and B.
physics-wave-superposition: Create a wave superposition diagram: two pulse waves approaching each other on a string, one upward pulse and one downward pulse, arrows showing motion, dashed resultant shape at overlap, and labels y1, y2, y.
physics-standing-wave-string: Create a standing wave on a string fixed at both ends: nodes at both ends and middle, antinodes between, wavelength lambda marker, amplitude A marker, and labels node/antinode.
physics-doppler-effect: Create a Doppler effect diagram: moving source S traveling right, compressed wavefronts ahead, spread wavefronts behind, observer A in front and observer B behind, velocity vs arrow.
physics-freebody-elevator: Create a free-body diagram for a person in an accelerating elevator: elevator box, person as block, normal force N upward, weight mg downward, acceleration a upward, and scale reading label.
physics-torque-wrench: Create a torque diagram: wrench pivot at O, force F applied at handle end at angle theta, lever arm r, perpendicular distance r sin theta, rotation arrow tau, and labels.
physics-rolling-cylinder: Create a rolling cylinder diagram: cylinder on horizontal ground, center O, translational velocity v, angular velocity omega, radius R, friction f at contact point, and no-slip condition v=omega R label.
physics-grav-orbit: Create an orbital motion diagram: planet M at center, satellite m on circular orbit radius r, velocity v tangent to orbit, gravitational force Fg toward center, and orbit path.
physics-kepler-ellipse: Create an elliptical orbit diagram: ellipse with Sun at one focus, planet at perihelion and aphelion positions, semi-major axis a, focus labels, and velocity arrows larger near perihelion.
physics-fluid-bernoulli: Create a Bernoulli pipe diagram: horizontal pipe narrowing from wide section A1 to narrow section A2, flow arrows, pressure labels P1 and P2, velocity labels v1 and v2, and height same level.
physics-hydraulic-press: Create a hydraulic press diagram: two connected cylinders with small piston area A1 and large piston area A2, forces F1 and F2 downward, fluid connection, pressure P label, and height line.
physics-thermal-expansion-rod: Create a thermal expansion diagram: metal rod before and after heating, original length L0, expanded length L0+Delta L, temperature change Delta T, and arrows showing expansion at both ends.
physics-photoelectric-effect: Create a photoelectric effect diagram: light photons incident on metal plate, emitted electrons leaving surface, collector plate at right, stopping potential V0, current arrow, and labels h nu and e-.
physics-bohr-orbits: Create a Bohr atom energy transition diagram: nucleus at center, two circular orbits n=1 and n=2, electron dropping from n=2 to n=1, emitted photon h nu arrow, and labels.
chem-vsepr-water: Create a VSEPR diagram for water H2O: central O with two H atoms, two lone-pair regions shown as dots, bent bond angle 104.5 degrees, and labels.
chem-ammonia-pyramid: Create a trigonal pyramidal ammonia NH3 diagram: central N, three H atoms arranged in pyramid style, one lone pair above N, bond angle 107 degrees, and labels.
chem-co2-linear: Create a linear CO2 molecular geometry diagram: O=C=O on a straight line, double bonds, 180 degree angle label, and partial charge labels if helpful.
chem-bf3-trigonal-planar: Create a trigonal planar BF3 diagram: central B with three F atoms 120 degrees apart, three B-F bonds, 120 degree angle marker, and labels.
chem-methane-tetrahedral: Create a tetrahedral methane CH4 diagram: central C, four H atoms with one wedge and one dashed bond, 109.5 degree angle label, and clean labels.
chem-ethene-pi-bond: Create an ethene C2H4 diagram: two carbon atoms double bonded, hydrogens around each carbon, sigma bond line, pi bond shown as shaded lobes above and below C=C, and labels.
chem-benzene-ring: Create a benzene diagram: hexagonal ring with alternating double bonds or inner circle, six H labels outside, and label C6H6.
chem-sn2-reaction: Create an SN2 reaction coordinate diagram: nucleophile Nu- attacking CH3-Br from backside, transition state with dashed Nu-C and C-Br bonds, leaving group Br-, and arrows.
chem-energy-profile-exothermic: Create an exothermic reaction energy profile: axes reaction coordinate and energy, reactants higher than products, one activation energy hump, Ea arrow, Delta H negative arrow, and labels.
chem-energy-profile-catalyst: Create a catalyzed vs uncatalyzed energy profile: same reactants and products, high dashed curve uncatalyzed, lower solid curve catalyzed, activation energy labels, and axes.
chem-hess-cycle: Create a Hess law cycle diagram: reactants A+B at top left, products C+D at top right, elements at bottom, arrows Delta H1, Delta H2, Delta H3 forming a cycle.
chem-born-haber: Create a Born-Haber cycle diagram for NaCl: Na(s)+1/2Cl2(g) to NaCl(s), steps sublimation, ionization, dissociation, electron affinity, lattice enthalpy, with vertical energy arrows.
chem-titration-curve-weak-acid: Create a weak acid strong base titration curve: pH vs volume NaOH, buffer region, half-equivalence point, equivalence point above pH 7, and labels.
chem-buffer-diagram: Create a buffer diagram: beaker with weak acid HA and conjugate base A-, added H+ consumed by A-, added OH- consumed by HA, arrows and labels.
chem-galvanic-cell: Create a galvanic cell diagram: Zn/Zn2+ half-cell and Cu2+/Cu half-cell, salt bridge, electron flow from Zn to Cu through wire, voltmeter, anode/cathode labels.
chem-electrolysis-cell: Create an electrolysis cell diagram: battery connected to two electrodes in solution, anode positive, cathode negative, ion movement arrows cations to cathode and anions to anode.
chem-nernst-concentration-cell: Create a concentration cell diagram: two identical metal electrodes in different ion concentrations, salt bridge, electron flow arrow, high and low concentration labels.
chem-phase-diagram-water: Create a phase diagram of water: pressure vs temperature axes, solid/liquid/gas regions, triple point, critical point, fusion curve sloping left, and labels.
chem-heating-curve: Create a heating curve for water: temperature vs heat added, sloped solid/liquid/gas regions, flat melting and boiling plateaus, labels 0C and 100C.
chem-crystal-lattice-nacl: Create a simple NaCl crystal lattice diagram: alternating Na+ and Cl- ions in a 2D square grid, unit cell outline, and labels.
chem-unit-cell-cubic: Create a cubic unit cell diagram: cube with atoms at eight corners and one atom at body center, labels corner atom and body center atom, and edge length a.
chem-hybridization-sp2: Create an sp2 hybridization diagram: three sp2 orbitals in trigonal planar arrangement 120 degrees apart and one unhybridized p orbital perpendicular, with labels.
chem-chromatography: Create a paper chromatography diagram: paper strip in solvent beaker, baseline, separated colored spots at different heights, solvent front, distance labels for Rf calculation.
chem-distillation-setup: Create a simple distillation apparatus diagram: round-bottom flask, thermometer, condenser, receiving flask, heat source, water in/out arrows, and vapor path.
chem-fractional-distillation: Create a fractional distillation column diagram: heated flask, fractionating column with plates, condenser, receiver, temperature gradient labels, and vapor/liquid arrows.
chem-le-chatelier-pressure: Create a Le Chatelier equilibrium diagram: container with N2, H2, NH3 molecules, piston compressing volume, shift arrow toward fewer gas moles, and equation N2+3H2 reversible 2NH3.
chem-maxwell-boltzmann: Create Maxwell-Boltzmann distribution curves: number of molecules vs kinetic energy, two curves T1 and higher T2, activation energy vertical line, shaded fraction above Ea.
chem-collision-orientation: Create a collision theory diagram: two reactant molecules approaching with correct orientation leading to product, and a second incorrect orientation collision bouncing apart.
chem-solubility-curve: Create a solubility curve graph: solubility vs temperature, curves for KNO3 and NaCl, point marked unsaturated/saturated/supersaturated, and axes labels.
chem-redox-half-reactions: Create a redox electron transfer diagram: Zn atom losing two electrons to Cu2+ ion, arrows for 2e-, products Zn2+ and Cu, oxidation and reduction labels.
math-circle-tangent-radius: Create a geometry diagram: circle centered O, tangent line at point T, radius OT perpendicular to tangent, right angle mark at T, external point P on tangent, and labels.
math-inscribed-angle: Create a circle theorem diagram: circle with chord AB, point C on circumference, central angle AOB and inscribed angle ACB subtending same arc AB, with labels.
math-cyclic-quadrilateral: Create a cyclic quadrilateral ABCD inside a circle, opposite angles A and C marked, arcs showing they are supplementary, and labels.
math-similar-triangles: Create similar triangles diagram: large triangle ABC with DE parallel BC, D on AB, E on AC, side labels AD=4, DB=6, AE=5, EC=7.5, and matching angle marks.
math-altitude-orthocenter: Create an acute triangle ABC with three altitudes drawn dashed from each vertex to opposite side, feet of altitudes labeled, orthocenter H marked, and labels.
math-median-centroid: Create triangle ABC with medians from each vertex to midpoint of opposite side, centroid G marked, midpoint labels, and 2:1 ratio annotation on one median.
math-angle-bisector: Create triangle ABC with angle bisector from A to side BC at D, equal angle arcs at A, side labels BD and DC, and angle bisector theorem note BD/DC = AB/AC.
math-coordinate-distance: Create coordinate plane with grid, points A(-3,1) and B(2,4), right triangle showing horizontal change 5 and vertical change 3, segment AB labeled d, and axes.
math-slope-intercept: Create a coordinate graph of line y=2x+1, y-intercept at (0,1), slope triangle showing rise 2 and run 1, and labeled axes.
math-quadratic-vertex: Create graph of parabola y=(x-1)^2-2, vertex (1,-2), axis of symmetry x=1 dashed, x-intercepts marked approximately, and axes.
math-transformations: Create coordinate grid showing triangle ABC and its translated image A'B'C' by vector (3,2), with arrows from each original vertex to image vertex.
math-reflection-line: Create coordinate grid showing triangle ABC reflected across line y=x to A'B'C', line y=x dashed, and corresponding point labels.
math-rotation-origin: Create coordinate grid showing point A(3,1) and its 90 degree counterclockwise rotation A'(-1,3) about origin O, with circular arrow and labels.
math-dilation-center: Create coordinate grid showing triangle ABC dilated from center O by scale factor 2 to A'B'C', rays from O through vertices, and labels.
math-vector-addition: Create vector addition diagram: vector a from origin to (3,1), vector b from head of a to (4,3), resultant r from origin to (4,3), parallelogram dashed, and labels.
math-3d-cuboid-diagonal: Create an oblique 2D drawing of cuboid ABCDEFGH with dimensions l,w,h, hidden edges dashed, space diagonal AG, and right angle at one corner.
math-net-cube: Create a cube net diagram: six equal squares arranged as a cross, central square with four around it and one attached to the top square, fold edges dashed, and labels.
math-prism-volume: Create a triangular prism diagram: triangular base shaded, length L, base b, height h of triangle, and volume formula V=1/2 b h L label.
math-cylinder-volume: Create a cylinder diagram: top and bottom ellipses, radius r on top circle, height h, vertical sides, and volume V=pi r^2 h label.
math-cone-similar-cross-section: Create a cone cross-section diagram: cone height H, radius R, smaller similar triangle at height h with radius r, central axis, and ratio r/R=h/H.
math-trig-unit-circle: Create unit circle diagram: coordinate axes, angle theta from positive x-axis, point P(cos theta, sin theta), radius 1, sine and cosine projection segments.
math-sine-graph: Create graph of y=sin x from 0 to 2pi, mark 0, pi/2, pi, 3pi/2, 2pi, amplitude 1, midline y=0, and labels.
math-law-of-sines: Create triangle ABC with sides a,b,c opposite angles A,B,C, circumcircle around triangle, diameter shown, and law of sines a/sin A = b/sin B = c/sin C label.
math-law-of-cosines: Create triangle with sides a,b,c and included angle C between a and b, altitude dashed to split side c, and formula c^2=a^2+b^2-2ab cos C label.
math-hyperbola-asymptotes: Create graph of hyperbola y=1/x with branches in quadrants I and III, x and y axes as asymptotes, sample points (1,1) and (-1,-1), and labels.
math-exponential-growth: Create graph of y=2^x with horizontal asymptote y=0, points (0,1),(1,2),(2,4), axes, and label exponential growth.
math-logarithm-graph: Create graph of y=log_2 x with vertical asymptote x=0, points (1,0),(2,1),(4,2), axes, and inverse relationship note with y=2^x dashed.
math-probability-tree: Create probability tree diagram: first split Rain/No rain with probabilities 0.3/0.7, second split Late/On time from each branch, terminal probabilities shown, and branch labels.
math-box-plot: Create a box-and-whisker plot on number line: min 2, Q1 5, median 7, Q3 10, max 14, labeled five-number summary and axis.
math-normal-distribution: Create a normal distribution curve: bell curve centered at mean mu, vertical lines at mu-sigma, mu, mu+sigma, shaded central region, and labels.
